workspaceDescription: pdfme based report design, backend template registry management, and branded PDF preview workspace.
draftStorageSubtitle: Starter drafts and backend registry work together
draftStorageHeadline: Unsaved work is stored in browser localStorage only for starter blueprints.
draftStorageBody: Backend report template tables now exist. Once a report is stored in the registry, the database becomes the source of truth.
draftStorageBodySecondary: Local draft storage remains only for pre-registry experimentation and setup.
registrySubtitle: Report templates saved in the database
emptyRegistryDescription: The first reports will appear here as drafts.
emptyBackendRegistryDescription: There are no report templates saved to the database yet.
emptyCapabilitiesDescription: Designer scope items are listed here.
registryActionsSubtitle: Syncs the designer draft with backend registry
notPublishedYet: This record does not have a published version yet.
starterDraftHint: This view is working on a starter draft only.
noPreviewDescription: You can generate a preview from the designer toolbar.
versionsSubtitle: Saved versions for the selected registry record
noVersionsDescription: Select a registry record to inspect version history.
